summary: Search posts by keywords, author, date range, content type, and company affiliation.

query_params.name: search
query_params.description: Keywords to search for in posts

query_params.name: profileId
query_params.description: Filter by author profile ID (comma-separated, faster than URL)

query_params.name: companyId
query_params.description: Filter by company ID (comma-separated, faster than URL)

query_params.name: authorsCompany
query_params.description: Filter by companies where post authors work (comma-separated)

query_params.name: authorsIndustryId
query_params.description: Filter by industry IDs of authors' companies (comma-separated)

query_params.name: mentioningMember
query_params.description: Filter posts mentioning a profile URL or ID (comma-separated)

query_params.name: mentioningCompany
query_params.description: Filter posts mentioning a company URL or ID (comma-separated)

query_params.name: contentType
query_params.description: Filter by type: videos, images, live_videos, documents, collaborative_articles, jobs

query_params.name: authorKeywords
query_params.description: Filter by keywords in authors' profiles

query_params.name: group
query_params.description: Filter by group URL or ID

query_params.name: postedLimit
query_params.description: Server-side filter by max posted date: 24h, week, month

query_params.name: paginationToken
query_params.description: Required if returned by previous page

notes: Profile and company filters return fewer results per entity; use dedicated profile-posts or company-posts endpoints for exhaustive extraction. Pagination token only when returned by previous response.
